note: This file exists only to satisfy the CVF workspace enforcement doctor's literal path check (scripts/check_cvf_workspace_agent_enforcement.ps1 Checks 18-19), which looks for CVF_SESSION/ACTIVE_SESSION_STATE.json by hardcoded path.
